name: 🐛 Core Bug Report

## 🚨 Execution Failure Description
A clear and concise description of what went wrong with the calculator runtime.

## 🕹️ Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See unexpected error signal.

## 💻 Environment Blueprint
- **Operating System:** [e.g., Windows 11, macOS Sequoia, Ubuntu 24.04]
- **Browser Context:** [e.g., Chrome, Firefox, Safari mobile]
- **Execution Vector:** [e.g., Option A Zip, Option B Git Clone, Option C Local Server]

## 📸 Visual Evidence
If applicable, drag and drop screenshots or screen recordings showing the broken layout matrix here.
